headline: Oceania Cruises® Introduces the Most Exclusive Fine Dining Restaurant at Sea: La Table par Maîtres Cuisiniers de France
summary: Oceania Cruises®, the world's leading culinary- and destination-focused luxury cruise line, today shared new details of La Table par Maîtres Cuisiniers de France, its highly anticipated new dining venue debuting aboard the brand's next-generation ship, Oceania Sonata.

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Royal Caribbean Cruises, Norwegian Cruise Line and OneSpaWorld
summary: Royal Caribbean leads resilient leisure stocks as strong cruise demand, pricing power and digital investments help offset industry headwinds from inflation and costs.
